# awscc_servicecatalog_accepted_portfolio_share (List Resource)

List all resources for `AWS::ServiceCatalog::AcceptedPortfolioShare` resource type.

## Example Usage

```terraform
list "awscc_servicecatalog_accepted_portfolio_share" "example" {
  provider = awscc
}
```
